name: Wattsquirrel
desc: This card can attack twice during each Battle Phase. If this card battles, negate the effects of the monster it battled, after damage calculation (including in the Graveyard).
mnst_eff: This card can attack twice during each Battle Phase. If this card battles, negate the effects of the monster it battled, after damage calculation (including in the Graveyard).
eff: This card can attack twice during each Battle Phase. If this card battles, negate the effects of the monster it battled, after damage calculation (including in the Graveyard).

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of battling monster after damage calculation
